query:
INSERT INTO timesheet_templates (name, description, serviceLine, fileKey, fileUrl, originalFileName, mimeType, uploadedBy, uploadedByName, isActive, createdAt, updatedAt) 
VALUES ('Divine Touch Weekly Timesheet', 'Standard weekly timesheet for all service lines. Includes time tracking, ADL/IADL documentation, and signature fields for PTP, DCW, and Provider.', 'All', 'templates/timesheet-template.pdf', '/timesheet-template.pdf', '_DivineTouchHomeCareLLC_Timesheet_update_2024.pdf', 'application/pdf', 1, 'System', true, NOW(), NOW());
